title: Common Form
description: Explore six considered everyday objects in a warm interactive showroom, inspect them in 3D, and build a persistent demo cart.

prompt.objective: Build a warm interactive showroom for six considered everyday objects.

mintAssets.brief: Six products plus sculptural showroom fixtures.
Warm campaign imagery for each product.
Showroom ambience and a restrained selection cue.

experience: Browse the collection, orbit product models, and open detailed product views.
Add products to a persistent demonstration cart with no live payment flow.
prompt.visualDirection: Warm modernist retail with sculptural lighting, tactile neutrals, and rust accents.

thumbnail.alt: Common Form showroom with the Everyday Tote and five everyday objects staged beneath warm sculptural lighting.

social.title: Common Form
social.description: Browse six everyday objects in a warm interactive 3D showroom and build a persistent demo cart.

image.alt: Common Form showroom with the Everyday Tote and five everyday objects staged beneath warm sculptural lighting.
